case_title: NEW GOLDEN DAISY, INC. VS. WALTER ZHONG HUA WONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS WALTER ZHONG HUA WONG, REN YI CAI, AND RU GUANG MA'S DEMURRERS TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT CONFIRMS THE TENTATIVE RULING. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2017 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2017 Continued To Mar-28-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 3/28/2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-24-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2016 Continued To Dec-07-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS WALTER ZHONG HUA WONG, REN YI CAI, and RU GUANG MA'S DEMURRERS TO COMPLAINT are ordered OFF CALENDAR for failure to comply with Code of Civil Procedure 430.41.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)
